allowed_use: Dated preference-measurement surface with category, split, publish date, snapshot id, and uncertainty/rank-compression caveats.
prohibited_use: Live rank, permanent winner, broad quality frontier, intelligence crown, user preference forever.
promotion_gate: Existing A-0013/A-0014 may stay final; any new screenshot requires raster hash, URL, page title, viewport, and rights review.

allowed_use: Benchmark-family literacy for function synthesis, repository repair, contamination-aware coding tasks, and terminal-agent harnesses.
prohibited_use: Productivity, production readiness, developer replacement, secure code quality, current best coder, autonomous engineer, enterprise usefulness.
promotion_gate: No numeric score or rank until same-scope result rows are normalized and C-0013-style blockers are resolved for that row.

allowed_use: Benchmark-root source cards that teach task shape before any modern model score: multiple-choice knowledge, hard science Q&A, math problems, truthfulness/common-falsehoods.
prohibited_use: General intelligence, truth, solved reasoning, expert equivalence, hallucination rate, deployed safety, current rank.
promotion_gate: Local capture hash and quote review before any source-excerpt card; model-score use requires model/card-specific result source.

allowed_use: Every benchmark exhibit must teach what is measured, what is not measured, and what fields make a score citeable.
prohibited_use: Frontier rank, adoption, business value, safety, real-world productivity, universal quality, price-quality.
promotion_gate: Final layout must show field labels or caption microcopy, not just a score or logo.
